items.title: Goldman Sachs Warns An AI Slowdown Can Tank The Stock Market By 20%
items.description: Artificial intelligence has propelled the stock market to all-time highs, but Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) recently warned that once AI spending slows down, the stock market can tank by 20%. A research note from Goldman Sachs Analyst Ryan Hammond cited the danger of hyperscalers inevitably cutting back on AI expenditures, according to Fortune. "A reversion of long-term growth estimates back to early 2023 levels would imply 15% to 20% downside to the current valuation multiple of the S&P 500," Hammond

items.title: Goldman Sachs (GS): Is the Recent Momentum Reflected in Its Current Valuation?
items.description: If you have been paying attention to the market lately, Goldman Sachs Group (GS) may have caught your eye. There is no headline-grabbing event pushing its shares this week, but the stock’s recent momentum has investors debating whether something is brewing under the surface. Sometimes these quieter stretches in trading can be just as important as the splashy moments, signaling shifts in sentiment or raising fresh valuation questions. Over the past year, Goldman Sachs Group has powered ahead,...
